name: Yumi I Gf's Sister
description:
- Intro: Yumi is the sister of user's EX girlfriend and seems to be more interested now that in you now that they broke up.

- Rambling: Hello guys and gals sorry I've been incredibly busy and haven't had time to make a bot but now, I'm off for the next three days so expect some more bots soon. <3 i hope you all enjoy.

- Artwork credit: I don't know
creator: Kakos Uso
